suite.name: V0.0.1 Acceptance

test.name: Application Loads Without Crashing

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0bf6b927-6054-4e91-823d-8436154bef95"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\saint\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python312\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:64313

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0bf6b927-6054-4e91-823d-8436154bef95"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Iconify Navigator']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The main heading must be rendered and no error banner must be visible after the page finishes loading.

test.name: Available Icon Sets Are Listed On Startup

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\826d3fbf-2a7e-4cdf-8f33-5651c7a73bdd"}

kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The collections list must contain at least one entry once the /collections response has been received.

test.name: Icons Are Not Preloaded On Startup

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: No icon images (SVG previews) must appear before the user explicitly opens a collection — lazy loading is required.

suite.doc:
Acceptance tests for Iconify Navigator — release 0.0.1.
Criteria: - The application must not crash. - The application must not preload icon data on startup. - The application must display the list of available icon sets fetched from the Iconify server using the /collections endpoint.
Prerequisites: the app must be running on http://localhost:4200.

suite.name: V0.0.2 Acceptance

test.name: Collection Cards Show Name Label

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\c8e6e7f0-3143-4b13-a442-f6ccac560ce9"}

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: ['Name: Material Symbols

Category: Material

Tags: Has Padding

Open Icon Set']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Every visible collection must display a "Name:" label so the user can identify the icon set.

test.name: Collections List Shows Category And Tags Labels

kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Among all loaded collections at least one must show a "Category:" label and at least one a "Tags:" label, confirming those metadata fields are rendered when present. Checked on the whole list container which is a unique element.

test.name: Open Icon Set Button Is Present For Each Collection

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\bb127f3c-9405-4ae6-b1a2-bbccfaa7ab54"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\saint\\progetti\\IconifyNavigator\\robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\bb127f3c-9405-4ae6-b1a2-bbccfaa7ab54"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:4200
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.msg: ${buttons} = 230
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.msg: ${cards} = 230
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Every collection card must contain an "Open Icon Set" button; the button count must equal the card count.

test.name: Opening A Collection Displays Icon Images

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens a fresh browser window and navigates to the app. Waits until the main heading is visible before returning.

kw.name: Collections Are Loaded
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .collection-card >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

Blocks until at least one collection card is visible, meaning the /collections API call has completed. Uses >> nth=0 to target the first card and avoid strict-mode violations (the API returns 200+ collections).

kw.name: Open First Collection
Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '.open-button >> nth=0'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .icon-img >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Clicks the first "Open Icon Set" button and waits until the icon images (SVG previews) are rendered. Uses >> nth=0 to avoid strict-mode violations.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Image To Load
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Image Should Be Loaded
Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.msg: Image not yet loaded or broken: .icon-img >> nth=0
kw.arg: Image not yet loaded or broken: ${selector}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
kw.status: Image not yet loaded or broken: .icon-img >> nth=0

kw.doc: Single-attempt helper for Wait For Image To Load. Fails immediately if the image has not finished loading.
kw.status: Image not yet loaded or broken: .icon-img >> nth=0

kw.name: Image Should Be Loaded
Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Image not yet loaded or broken: ${selector}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Single-attempt helper for Wait For Image To Load. Fails immediately if the image has not finished loading.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Polls an img element until naturalWidth > 0, which confirms the browser has fully fetched and decoded the image file. naturalWidth stays 0 for broken or not-yet-loaded images.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: After clicking "Open Icon Set" the icon grid must appear and at least one SVG image must have loaded successfully. Wait For Image To Load polls until naturalWidth > 0, which confirms the browser fetched and decoded the image — not just that the element exists in the DOM with CSS dimensions.

test.name: Opened Collection Section Heading Contains Collection Name

kw.name: Open Iconify Navigator
New Browser

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Material Symbols - Icons']
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The section heading must follow the pattern "<Name> - Icons" so the user knows which icon set they are browsing. The second h2 on the page is the collection heading (first is "Available icon sets").

test.name: Closing A Collection Returns To The Icon Sets List

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Clicking the "Close" button must hide the icon grid and restore the collections list view.

suite.doc:
Acceptance tests for Iconify Navigator — release 0.0.2.
Criteria: - Each icon-set card must display name, category and tags in the format "Name: <name> Category: <cat> Tags: <t1>, <t2>, ...". - Each card must have an "Open Icon Set" button. - Clicking the button must open the icon set and display the icons contained in it, each with an SVG preview fetched from the API.
Prerequisites: the app must be running on http://localhost:4200.
